review_scope: github:org/example-corp — repository and org-level permissions review

decisions.rationale: Org admin grants full control over all repositories, members, billing, and security settings. No business case justifies persistent standing org-admin for individual user accounts. Confirmed CRITICAL; recommended migration to team-maintainer roles with org-admin available only via JIT.
compensating_controls: Revoke standing org-admin; grant via JIT approval workflow only
Require GitHub org owner MFA enforcement policy
Audit org-admin grants monthly via GitHub audit log API

decisions.rationale: Write access to a named repository is expected for contributors. MEDIUM is appropriate when the repository contains application code but not secrets or regulated data. Confirmed; no override needed.
compensating_controls: Require branch protection rules on main/master
Enable secret scanning on the repository

decisions.rationale: Webhook admin grants the ability to register arbitrary HTTP endpoints that receive repository events including code, PR content, and secrets accidentally committed. A malicious or compromised webhook can exfiltrate sensitive data. Policy HIGH is correct; vendor MEDIUM underestimates exfiltration risk.
compensating_controls: Maintain an allowlist of approved webhook URLs via org policy
Alert on new webhook registrations via GitHub audit log
Rotate any secrets exposed in webhook payloads immediately on detection
